[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows large, black, lowercase text on a white background reading “kamu kok ganteng.”

The main visual focus is the stacked text “kamu kok ganteng” arranged in three lines, with varying letter spacing and thick, sans-serif letterforms.

The setting is an uncluttered, plain white background with high-contrast black text, presented in a close-up crop that only includes the text.

The text is left-aligned and fills most of the frame, with line breaks between “kamu,” “kok,” and “ganteng,” and no other visible elements.

No important visible text detected.

In plain language, the image displays three lines of Indonesian-looking text. The text is presented clearly in large black letters on a white background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

kanu  
kok  
gantung  

# Structured Version

- kanu  
- kok  
- gantung  

# Notes

The text appears as three separate lines: “kanu”, “kok”, “gantung”. No additional context is visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
